title: festuca degenii
intro: Festuca degenii, also known as Degen's fescue or Degen's grass, is a species of grass within the genus Festuca. This perennial grass is native to the mountainous regions of the Balkan Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and exhibit antifungal and antibacterial effects. Festuca degenii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
